items.name: port-forward
items.description: A multi-backend Linux port forwarding management script with interactive and CLI modes.

items.name: Cheat-Engine-Linux-Linked
items.description: CELL is a Linux-first, Proton-aware build of the freely-available [Cheat Engine](https://github.com/cheat-engine/cheat-engine) source code, focused on running the full inspect / scan / debug / autoassembler-injection workflow against native Linux processes and Steam games launched through Proton, on a Fedora x86_64 host.

items.name: byob
items.description: Bring Your Own Browser — let your AI agent use the Chrome you already have open

items.name: DecisionGraph
items.description: DecisionGraph is an engineering decision memory system that captures evidence from GitHub/Slack/Jira, answers “why” questions, and runs pre-change guardrails via CLI/API/MCP.

items.name: agentcon-harness
items.description: A minimal teaching-grade agent harness in TypeScript. Built for AgentCon Pune 2026 — talk: 'Let's Build a Harness'.

items.name: codexflow
items.description: Go Agent：Windows、Linux、macOS (go原生支持多端) 客户端支持平台：Windows、Linux、macOS、iOS、Android、Web

items.name: claude-history-manager
items.description: A native macOS browser for your Claude Code session history. Search, pin, tag, resume sessions in any terminal. Transcripts stay on your Mac.

items.name: hermes-memory-skills
items.description: Memory hygiene skills for Hermes Agent — dreaming (3-phase consolidation) and lean check (surgical trimmer)

items.name: worldbook-skill
items.description: A skill for Agent to write Worldbook for SillyTavern

items.name: Conjure-Animals-5e
items.description: Its a Conjure Animals Simulator for the 5e spell.

items.name: CloudMail
items.description: CloudMail: a polished Expo/React Native mobile admin client for Cloudflare temporary email systems.

items.name: OC-World
items.description: A website for making original fantasy worlds and characters

items.name: tvcontrol
items.description: TVControl: TradingView MCP System. AI remote control for TradingView Desktop. 88 MCP tools, ~320 tests, full CLI parity. All local, no cloud calls.

items.name: xiasql-ui
items.description: A UI-focused secondary development build based on xia_sql for Burp Suite.

items.name: WoOOLToOOLsSharp
items.description: WoOOLToOOLs项目的C#版，传奇世界地图编辑器 + 资源编辑器。

items.name: Quick-Shoot
items.description: QuickShoot is an intelligent web application built to help students, job seekers, and professionals prepare for interviews with confidence. It provides a realistic mock interview experience by generating personalized questions based on the user's chosen role, skills, and experience level.
